summary: Governance Widget Drill-Down feature fully tested - Backend 100% (16/16 tests passed), Frontend 100% (all clickable elements, modals, filters, and response form verified working correctly).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints correctly implemented: GET /api/gs1/disputes (list with filters), GET /api/gs1/disputes/{dispute_id} (detail), POST /api/gs1/disputes/{dispute_id}/respond (add response)
All dispute list filters work correctly: status (open/resolved/closed/under_review/escalated), priority (critical/high/medium/low), pagination
Dispute detail endpoint correctly resolves label_name from uln_labels collection
Response endpoint correctly adds responses to activity timeline and optionally changes status
GovernanceWidget clickable elements all work: '1 open' badge, 'View All' button, stat cards, priority rows, status chips, recent dispute rows
DisputeListModal correctly displays all disputes with filters and clickable rows
DisputeDetailModal correctly shows title, status, priority, label name, dispute ID, description, activity timeline
Response form only appears for active disputes (not closed/resolved) - correct behavior
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing label_disputes collection (7 disputes: 1 under_review, 1 resolved, 5 closed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Governance Widget Drill-Down feature fully implemented and tested on /gs1-licensing page Overview tab. Three new backend endpoints: GET /api/gs1/disputes (list with status/priority filters, pagination), GET /api/gs1/disputes/{dispute_id} (single dispute detail with label_name resolved), POST /api/gs1/disputes/{dispute_id}/respond (add response with optional status change). Frontend components: DisputeListModal (data-testid='dispute-list-modal') with filters and clickable rows, DisputeDetailModal (data-testid='dispute-detail-modal') with full dispute info and response form for active disputes. GovernanceWidget clickable elements: governance-open-badge, governance-view-all, governance-stat-open, governance-stat-resolved, governance-priority-{priority}, governance-status-{status}, recent-dispute-{id}. Current data: 7 disputes total (1 under_review 'Split disagreement on Track A', 1 resolved, 5 closed). Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!

backend_endpoints.GET /api/gs1/disputes (no filter): PASS - Returns all 7 disputes with total, page, page_size, total_pages, label_name resolved
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gs1/disputes?status=open: PASS - Filters correctly, returns only open disputes
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gs1/disputes?status=resolved: PASS - Filters correctly, returns only resolved disputes
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gs1/disputes?status=closed: PASS - Filters correctly, returns only closed disputes
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gs1/disputes?priority=critical: PASS - Filters correctly, returns only critical priority disputes
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gs1/disputes?priority=high: PASS - Filters correctly, returns only high priority disputes
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gs1/disputes pagination: PASS - page and page_size parameters work correctly
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gs1/disputes combined filters: PASS - status + priority filters work together
backend_endpoints.GET /api/gs1/disputes/{dispute_id}: PASS - Returns single dispute with all fields including label_name
backend_endpoints.POST /api/gs1/disputes/{dispute_id}/resp: PASS - Adds response to activity timeline
PASS - Changes status and adds response
backend_endpoints.Governance overview integration: PASS - Dispute counts match between overview and list endpoints

frontend_components.'1 open' badge click: PASS - Opens DisputeListModal filtered to status=open
frontend_components.'View All' button click: PASS - Opens DisputeListModal with all disputes
frontend_components.'Open Disputes' stat card click: PASS - Opens DisputeListModal filtered to status=open

frontend_components.Priority row click (Critical): PASS - Opens DisputeListModal filtered to priority=critical

frontend_components.DisputeListModal renders: PASS - Shows all disputes with status/priority filters
frontend_components.DisputeListModal filters: PASS - Status and priority dropdowns filter the list
frontend_components.DisputeDetailModal renders: PASS - Shows title, status, priority, label name, dispute ID, description, activity timeline
frontend_components.DisputeDetailModal response form: PASS - Textarea, status dropdown, submit button visible for active disputes
